name: Snapper and Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 12 medium shrimp, peeled, deveined, and cut into 1/2-inch pieces
1 lemon, peeled, seeded, and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 150°C.
2. Dredge the snapper fillets in flour. Heat oil in a large frying pan and add the fillets. Cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, depending on size, over medium heat. Season when turning the fillets over.
3. Remove the fillets from the pan and keep them hot in the oven.
4. Add butter and shrimp to the pan. Season with salt and pepper, and add all remaining ingredients; cook for 3 minutes over medium heat.
5. Remove the red snapper from the oven and serve with shrimp.
